fields.label: Request timeout in seconds
fields.description: Request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 30

relationships.description: Connection to a Wavefront (VMware Aria Operations for Applications) cluster: the API base URL and the Bearer token used against it. Both are required — pkg/models/settings.go:32-37 rejects an empty url ('invalid url') or empty token ('invalid credentials').

instructions.msg: The Wavefront (VMware Aria Operations for Applications) datasource authenticates against the Wavefront API with a single API token stored in secureJsonData.token. Every outgoing request adds an 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header (pkg/datasource/datasource.go:45-47; pkg/wavefront/client.go:39-44). There are no other authentication methods.

Minimal working payload: {"jsonData":{"url":"https://try.wavefront.com"},"secureJsonData":{"token":"<your-wavefront-api-token>"}}. Both jsonData.url and secureJsonData.token are strictly required — pkg/models/settings.go:32-37 returns 'invalid url' when url is empty and 'invalid credentials' when token is empty. Generate an API token from your Wavefront / Aria Operations for Applications user profile.

secureJsonData.token is write-only: it can be set or reset but never read back. To check whether the token is already configured on an existing datasource, read secureJsonFields.token (boolean) instead of secureJsonData.token (src/components/ConfigEditor.tsx:77-81).

jsonData.url is the Wavefront cluster / API base URL (for example https://try.wavefront.com or https://<your-cluster>.wavefront.com), without a trailing slash. The backend trims one trailing '/' (pkg/datasource/datasource.go:42; pkg/wavefront/wavefront.go:40) and then joins API paths such as '/api/v2/accesspolicy' onto it (pkg/datasource/handler_healthcheck.go:20). The editor pre-fills https://try.wavefront.com, but the backend does NOT default an empty url — it is required.

jsonData.requestTimeout is the per-request timeout in seconds (optional; defaults to 30). It is stored under jsonData, not at the datasource root. A missing, null, or non-positive value falls back to 30 — pkg/models/settings.go:23-24 seeds the default before unmarshal and pkg/datasource/client.go:20-22 coerces any value <= 0 to 30 when building the HTTP client.
